title: Hancea capuronii

The classification of Hancea capuronii is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the order Malpighiales. The family Euphorbiaceae is characterized by its diverse range of plants, including trees, shrubs, and succulents. Hancea capuronii is native to Madagascar, where it can be found growing in its natural habitat.
